title: 丢东西
description_uz: «Mening mashina kalitimni ko'rmadingmi?» — ofisda hamkasbidan yo'qolgan kalitni topishda yordam so'rash suhbati. Bu muloqotda oxirgi ishlatilgan vaqtni eslash, joylarni izlash, narsani tasvirlash va xizmatga so'rab borish mashq qilinadi. Real, taranglikka to'la vaziyat va foydali fe'llar bilan boy. Rol o'ynang va soyalab takrorlab ravonlikni oshiring.
description_ru: «Ты не видел мой ключ от машины?» — в офисе человек просит коллегу помочь найти потерянный ключ. В диалоге отрабатываются вспоминание, когда им пользовались в последний раз, перебор мест, описание предмета и просьба о помощи. Реальная, напряжённая ситуация с полезными глаголами. Разыграйте по ролям и повторяйте за диктором для беглости.
description_en: «Have you seen my car keys?» — at the office, someone asks a colleague to help find lost keys. The dialogue practices recalling when they were last used, retracing places, describing an object, and asking for help. A real, suspenseful scene rich in useful verbs. Role-play it and shadow along to boost fluency.

sentences.text_original: 小王，你看见我的车钥匙了吗？我找了好久都找不到。
sentences.pinyin: Xiǎo Wáng, nǐ kànjiàn wǒ de chē yàoshi le ma? Wǒ zhǎo le hǎojiǔ dōu zhǎo bú dào.
sentences.text_translation: Xiao Vang, mening mashina kalitimni ko'rmadingmi? Ancha vaqt qidirdim, lekin topa olmadim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сяо Ван, ты не видел мой ключ от машины? Я уже долго ищу и никак не могу найти.
sentences.text_translation_en: Xiao Wang, have you seen my car keys? I've been looking for a long time and can't find them.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 没看见啊。你最后一次用钥匙是什么时候？
sentences.pinyin: Méi kànjiàn a. Nǐ zuìhòu yī cì yòng yàoshi shì shénme shíhou?
sentences.text_translation: Ko'rmadim. Kalitni oxirgi marta qachon ishlatgan eding?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не видел. Когда ты в последний раз пользовался ключом?
sentences.text_translation_en: I haven't seen them. When was the last time you used the keys?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我记得早上开车来公司，停好车以后就把钥匙放在口袋里了。然后我就没动过。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jìde zǎoshang kāichē lái gōngsī, tíng hǎo chē yǐhòu jiù bǎ yàoshi fàng zài kǒudai lǐ le. Ránhòu wǒ jiù méi dòng guo.
sentences.text_translation: Eslayman, ertalab mashinada ishga keldim, mashinani to'xtatgandan keyin kalitni cho'ntakka soldim. Keyin unga tegmadim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Помню, утром приехал на машине в офис, припарковался и положил ключ в карман. После этого я его не трогал.
sentences.text_translation_en: I remember driving to the company in the morning, and after parking I put the keys in my pocket. Then I didn't touch them.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那你刚才去没去过会议室或者洗手间？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ gāngcái qù méi qù guo huìyì shì huòzhě xǐshǒujiān?
sentences.text_translation: Unda hozir yig'ilish xonasiga yoki hojatxonaga borib keldingmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А ты только что ходил в переговорную или в туалет?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then did you just go to the meeting room or the restroom?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 去过！我刚才去了趟洗手间，回来以后就发现钥匙不见了。
sentences.pinyin: Qù guo! Wǒ gāngcái qù le tàng xǐshǒujiān, huílái yǐhòu jiù fāxiàn yàoshi bú jiàn le.
sentences.text_translation: Bordim! Hozirgina hojatxonaga borib keldim, qaytib kelganimdan keyin kalit yo'qolganini sezdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ходил! Я только что сходил в туалет, а когда вернулся, обнаружил, что ключа нет.
sentences.text_translation_en: I did! I just went to the restroom, and after coming back I noticed the keys were gone.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那很可能掉在洗手间了。你要不要回去看看？
sentences.pinyin: Nà hěn kěnéng diào zài xǐshǒujiān le. Nǐ yào bú yào huíqù kàn kan?
sentences.text_translation: Unda u hojatxonaga tushib qolgan bo'lishi mumkin. Qaytib borib ko'rmaysanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда он, скорее всего, упал в туалете. Не хочешь вернуться посмотреть?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then they probably fell in the restroom. Do you want to go back and check?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我刚才已经回去找过了，但是没找到。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gāngcái yǐjīng huíqù zhǎo guo le, dànshì méi zhǎodào.
sentences.text_translation: Men hozir borib qidirib ham keldim, lekin topa olmadim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я уже сходил и поискал, но не нашёл.
sentences.text_translation_en: I already went back and looked, but I didn't find them.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 别着急，你再想想，除了洗手间还去过哪里？
sentences.pinyin: Bié zháojí, nǐ zài xiǎng xiǎng, chúle xǐshǒujiān hái qù guo nǎli?
sentences.text_translation: Xavotir olma, yana bir o'ylab ko'r, hojatxonadan tashqari yana qayerga borgan eding?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не волнуйся, подумай ещё раз, куда ты ходил кроме туалета?
sentences.text_translation_en: Don't worry, think again, where else did you go besides the restroom?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 对了！我中午去楼下便利店买了瓶水，可能那时候掏钱包的时候把钥匙带出来了。
sentences.pinyin: Duìle! Wǒ zhōngwǔ qù lóuxià biànlì diàn mǎi le píng shuǐ, kěnéng nà shíhou tāo qiánbāo de shíhou bǎ yàoshi dài chūlái le.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri! Tushda pastdagi do'konga bir shisha suv olgani tushdim, ehtimol o'shanda hamyonni olayotganda kalitni ham olib chiqqanman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Точно! В обед я спускался в магазинчик внизу за бутылкой воды, наверное тогда, доставая кошелёк, вытащил и ключ.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right! At noon I went down to the convenience store to buy a bottle of water, maybe I pulled the keys out along with my wallet then.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那你快去便利店问问吧，说不定店员捡到了。
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ kuài qù biànlì diàn wèn wen ba, shuōbúdìng diànyuán jiǎn dào le.
sentences.text_translation: Unda tezroq do'konga borib so'rab ko'r, balki sotuvchi topib olgandir.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда скорее сходи в магазинчик и спроси, может, продавец его подобрал.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then quickly go ask at the convenience store, maybe the clerk picked them up.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 可是我现在走不开，马上要开会了。你能不能帮我去问一下？
sentences.pinyin: Kěshì wǒ xiànzài zǒu bù kāi, mǎshàng yào kāihuì le. Nǐ néng bùnéng bāng wǒ qù wèn yíxià?
sentences.text_translation: Lekin men hozir keta olmayman, hozir yig'ilish boshlanadi. Men uchun borib so'rab kela olasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Но я сейчас не могу отлучиться, скоро совещание. Ты не мог бы сходить спросить за меня?
sentences.text_translation_en: But I can't leave right now, the meeting is about to start. Could you go ask for me?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 行，我帮你去看看。你那个车钥匙是什么样的？
sentences.pinyin: Xíng, wǒ bāng nǐ qù kàn kan. Nǐ nà ge chē yàoshi shì shénmeyàng de?
sentences.text_translation: Mayli, men borib ko'rib kelaman. Mashina kaliting qanaqa?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, я схожу посмотрю. А как выглядит твой ключ от машины?
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll go check for you. What do your car keys look like?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 黑色的，挂着一个红色的钥匙扣，上面有个小熊图案。
sentences.pinyin: Hēisè de, guà zhe yí ge hóngsè de yàoshikòu, shàngmiàn yǒu ge xiǎo xióng tú'àn.
sentences.text_translation: Qora rangli, unga qizil rangli kalit halqasi osilgan, ustida kichkina ayiq rasmi bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Чёрный, на нём висит красный брелок, а на нём рисунок медвежонка.
sentences.text_translation_en: Black, with a red keychain attached, and there's a little bear pattern on it.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好的，我记住了。你先去开会，我找到以后给你打电话。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ jìzhù le. Nǐ xiān qù kāihuì, wǒ zhǎodào yǐhòu gěi nǐ dǎ diànhuà.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, eslab qoldim. Sen avval yig'ilishga bor, topganimdan keyin senga qo'ng'iroq qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, я запомнил. Ты пока иди на совещание, а я найду и позвоню тебе.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I've remembered. You go to the meeting first, and I'll call you after I find them.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 太感谢了！如果找不到的话，我今天就回不了家了。
sentences.pinyin: Tài gǎnxiè le! Rúguǒ zhǎo bú dào dehuà, wǒ jīntiān jiù huí bù liǎo jiā le.
sentences.text_translation: Katta rahmat! Agar topilmasa, bugun uyga qayta olmay qolaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Большое спасибо! Если не найдётся, я сегодня не смогу попасть домой.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thank you so much! If they aren't found, I won't be able to get home today.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 放心，应该能找到。你开会去吧。
sentences.pinyin: Fàngxīn, yīnggāi néng zhǎodào. Nǐ kāihuì qù ba.
sentences.text_translation: Xotirjam bo'l, topilsa kerak. Sen yig'ilishga boraver.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не переживай, должны найтись. Иди на совещание.
sentences.text_translation_en: Don't worry, they should turn up. Go to your meeting.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 喂，你的钥匙找到了！果然在便利店收银台，店员捡到了。
sentences.pinyin: Wèi, nǐ de yàoshi zhǎodào le! Guǒrán zài biànlì diàn shōuyíntái, diànyuán jiǎn dào le.
sentences.text_translation: Allo, kalitingni topdim! Haqiqatan ham do'kondagi kassada ekan, sotuvchi topib olibdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Алло, твой ключ нашёлся! Как и думали, он был на кассе магазинчика, продавец его подобрал.
sentences.text_translation_en: Hello, your keys are found! Just as expected, they were at the convenience store checkout counter, the clerk picked them up.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 太好了！太谢谢你了！我开完会就去拿。
sentences.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Tài xièxie nǐ le! Wǒ kāi wán huì jiù qù ná.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi! Senga katta rahmat! Yig'ilish tugashi bilan borib olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично! Огромное тебе спасибо! Как закончится совещание, сразу схожу заберу.
sentences.text_translation_en: Great! Thank you so much! I'll go get them right after the meeting ends.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不用谢！下次小心点，别再丢东西了。
sentences.pinyin: Búyòng xiè! Xià cì xiǎoxīn diǎn, bié zài diū dōngxi le.
sentences.text_translation: Arzimaydi! Keyingi safar ehtiyot bo'l, boshqa narsa yo'qotma.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не за что! В следующий раз будь осторожнее, больше не теряй вещи.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're welcome! Be more careful next time, don't lose things again.
sentences.speaker: B
